title: Custom Decorated Sugar Cookie Gift Boxes • Las Vegas, NV
announcement: Welcome to MomentosByCookies! Every cookie is hand-decorated with royal icing right here in Las Vegas. I specialize in holiday gift boxes, Quinceañera celebration sets, and seasonal cookie collections. Please allow 5-7 business days for made-to-order items. For large event orders (Quinceañeras, parties), message me first so we can plan together!
sale_message: Thank you for your order! I'll start on your cookies within 1-2 business days. Each one is decorated by hand so no two are exactly alike. Reach out any time with questions!
policy_payment: I accept payments through Etsy's secure checkout including credit cards, debit cards, Etsy gift cards, and PayPal. For custom event orders over $150, a 50% deposit is required to hold your date.
policy_shipping: All orders ship via USPS Priority Mail from Las Vegas, NV 89147. Made-to-order items ship within 5-7 business days. Ready-to-ship items go out within 2-3 business days. Perishable baked goods ship Monday–Wednesday only to avoid weekend delays.
policy_refunds: I want you to love your cookies! If your order arrives damaged, contact me within 48 hours with photos and I'll send a replacement or full refund. Due to the perishable and custom nature of my work, I cannot accept returns on opened or undamaged boxes.
